'''lonajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xtreme|xtreme]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-n-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xtreme|xtreme]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lonajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lonajithi|lonajithi]] || [[word:lonajiji|lonajiji]] || [[word:lonajishi|lonajishi]] || [[word:lonajiki|lonajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lonajuthuthu|lonajuthuthu]] || [[word:lonajujuju|lonajujuju]] || [[word:lonajushushu|lonajushushu]] || [[word:lonajukuku|lonajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lonajuthu|lonajuthu]] || [[word:lonajuju|lonajuju]] || [[word:lonajushu|lonajushu]] || [[word:lonajuku|lonajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lonajufthuf|lonajufthuf]] || [[word:lonajufjuf|lonajufjuf]] || [[word:lonajufshuf|lonajufshuf]] || [[word:lonajufkuf|lonajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lonajethe|lonajethe]] || [[word:lonajeje|lonajeje]] || [[word:lonajeshe|lonajeshe]] || [[word:lonajeke|lonajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lonajothotho|lonajothotho]] || [[word:lonajojojo|lonajojojo]] || [[word:lonajoshosho|lonajoshosho]] || [[word:lonajokoko|lonajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lonajotho|lonajotho]] || [[word:lonajojo|lonajojo]] || [[word:lonajosho|lonajosho]] || [[word:lonajoko|lonajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lonajofthof|lonajofthof]] || [[word:lonajofjof|lonajofjof]] || [[word:lonajofshof|lonajofshof]] || [[word:lonajofkof|lonajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lonajÃŸfthÃŸf|lonajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lonajÃŸfjÃŸf|lonajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lonajÃŸfshÃŸf|lonajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lonajÃŸfkÃŸf|lonajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lonajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|lonajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lonajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|lonajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lonajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|lonajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lonajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|lonajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lonajÃŸfthÃŸf|lonajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lonajÃŸfjÃŸf|lonajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lonajÃŸfshÃŸf|lonajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lonajÃŸfkÃŸf|lonajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lonajÃŸfthÃŸf|lonajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lonajÃŸfjÃŸf|lonajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lonajÃŸfshÃŸf|lonajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lonajÃŸfkÃŸf|lonajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lonajÃḊthÃḊ|lonajÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:lonajÃḊjÃḊ|lonajÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:lonajÃḊshÃḊ|lonajÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:lonajÃḊkÃḊ|lonajÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lonajathatha|lonajathatha]] || [[word:lonajajaja|lonajajaja]] || [[word:lonajashasha|lonajashasha]] || [[word:lonajakaka|lonajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lonajatha|lonajatha]] || [[word:lonajaja|lonajaja]] || [[word:lonajasha|lonajasha]] || [[word:lonajaka|lonajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lonajafthaf|lonajafthaf]] || [[word:lonajafjaf|lonajafjaf]] || [[word:lonajafshaf|lonajafshaf]] || [[word:lonajafkaf|lonajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lonajasha|lonajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lonajshÃḋasha|lonajshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lonajroasha|lonajroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lonajmuasha|lonajmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lonajyaasha|lonajyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golonajnkshÃḋasha|golonajnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golonajnkroasha|golonajnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golonajnkmuasha|golonajnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golonajnkyaasha|golonajnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lonanajasha|lonanajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lonanajshÃḋasha|lonanajshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lonanajroasha|lonanajroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lonanajmuasha|lonanajmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lonanajyaasha|lonanajyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golonanajnkshÃḋasha|golonanajnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golonanajnkroasha|golonanajnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golonanajnkmuasha|golonanajnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golonanajnkyaasha|golonanajnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lenÃḊjasha|lenÃḊjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lenÃḊjshÃḋasha|lenÃḊjshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lenÃḊjroasha|lenÃḊjroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lenÃḊjmuasha|lenÃḊjmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lenÃḊjyaasha|lenÃḊjyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golenÃḊjnkshÃḋasha|golenÃḊjnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golenÃḊjnkroasha|golenÃḊjnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golenÃḊjnkmuasha|golenÃḊjnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golenÃḊjnkyaasha|golenÃḊjnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lonfajasha|lonfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lonfajshÃḋasha|lonfajshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lonfajroasha|lonfajroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lonfajmuasha|lonfajmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lonfajyaasha|lonfajyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golonfajnkshÃḋasha|golonfajnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golonfajnkroasha|golonfajnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golonfajnkmuasha|golonfajnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golonfajnkyaasha|golonfajnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
